example: I am still experiencing discomfort in my lower back.
zh: 不適，身體不舒服的感覺

example: Let me check your vitals to see how you are doing.
zh: 生命徵象，指心跳、呼吸、血壓等重要生理指標
ja: バイタルサイン、心拍数や血圧などの生命徴候

example: I will administer a mild pain reliever to help ease your pain.
zh: 止痛藥，緩解疼痛的藥物
ja: 鎮痛剤、痛みを和らげる薬

example: The nurse will administer the medication at the right time.
ja: 投与する、薬や治療を行う

example: The physical therapist will help improve your mobility.
ja: 移動能力、身体の動きやすさ

example: The doctor will do another assessment tomorrow.
zh: 評估，對病情或狀況的判斷
ja: 評価、病状や状態の判断

example: Focus on resting and regaining your strength for a smooth recovery.
zh: 康復，從疾病或手術中恢復健康
ja: 回復、病気や手術からの健康の回復

example: I am still experiencing discomfort in my lower back.
zh: 不適，身體不舒服的感覺

example: The nurse will make a note of your symptoms in your chart.
zh: 病歷表，記錄病人健康狀況的文件
ja: カルテ、患者の健康状態を記録する書類

example: Do you feel any nausea or dizziness?
ja: 吐き気、嘔吐しそうな感じ
